reporting_unit: Filing reports in USD millions (scale=6 per XBRL tags). All monetary values multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw dollars. Shares reported in millions (scale=6) multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw count.

company_mapping.revenue: us-gaap:Revenues — labeled 'Revenue' on income statement face. Single revenue line, no disaggregation on face.
company_mapping.cogs: us-gaap:CostOfRevenue — labeled 'Cost of revenue' on income statement face.
company_mapping.gross_profit: us-gaap:GrossProfit — explicitly reported on income statement face as 'Gross profit'.
company_mapping.operating_income: us-gaap:OperatingIncomeLoss — labeled 'Operating income' on income statement face.
company_mapping.net_income: us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss — labeled 'Net income' on both IS and CF statement; cross-statement check confirms same value used as CFO starting line.
company_mapping.interest_expense: us-gaap:InterestExpenseNonoperating — labeled 'Interest expense' on IS, reported as gross outflow (62 for Q2 FY2026, displayed as (62) in HTML). This is gross interest expense per the filing. Interest income is separately disclosed as us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest. Stored as negative per policy.
company_mapping.sbc: us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensation — labeled 'Stock-based compensation expense' in CF operating section addback. Also confirmed by us-gaap:AllocatedShareBasedCompensationExpense in IS xbrl_not_on_statement with identical values.
company_mapping.dna: us-gaap:DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization — labeled 'Depreciation and amortization' in CF operating section. Single line covering all D&A.
company_mapping.diluted_shares: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberOfDilutedSharesOutstanding — labeled 'Diluted weighted average shares' on IS.
company_mapping.cash: us-gaap:CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue — labeled 'Cash and cash equivalents' on balance sheet.
company_mapping.short_term_investments: us-gaap:MarketableSecuritiesCurrent — labeled 'Marketable securities' on balance sheet current assets.
company_mapping.accounts_receivable: us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent — labeled 'Accounts receivable, net' on balance sheet. Pure trade AR per XBRL concept.
company_mapping.accounts_payable: us-gaap:AccountsPayableCurrent — labeled 'Accounts payable' on balance sheet. Separately stated from accrued liabilities; pure trade AP.
company_mapping.total_assets: us-gaap:Assets — labeled 'Total assets' on balance sheet.
company_mapping.equity: us-gaap:StockholdersEquity — labeled 'Total shareholders equity' on balance sheet. No noncontrolling interest present; this is parent-only equity.
company_mapping.short_term_debt: No current portion of long-term debt or notes payable appears on balance sheet face or in xbrl_not_on_statement. Total current liabilities comprises only Accounts payable and Accrued and other current liabilities. No commercial paper or short-term borrowings disclosed. Set to 0.
company_mapping.long_term_debt: us-gaap:LongTermDebtNoncurrent — labeled 'Long-term debt' on balance sheet noncurrent section. Confirmed by us-gaap:LongTermDebt in xbrl_not_on_statement with same value.
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities: Current: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent from BS xbrl_not_on_statement (classified within AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent). Non-current: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent on BS face as 'Long-term operating lease liabilities'. Total confirmed by us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiability = 2,132M at Jul 27 2025 (301 current + 1,831 noncurrent = 2,132). Used total = current + noncurrent to avoid double counting.
company_mapping.cfo: us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInOperatingActivities — labeled 'Net cash provided by operating activities' on CF statement.
company_mapping.capex: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets — labeled 'Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets' in CF investing section. Stored as negative per policy. Note: this is YTD for Q2 filing.
company_mapping.acquisitions: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireBusinessesNetOfCashAcquired — labeled 'Acquisitions, net of cash acquired' in CF investing section. Stored as negative per policy.
company_mapping.rd_expense: us-gaap:ResearchAndDevelopmentExpense — labeled 'Research and development' on IS face.
company_mapping.interest_income: us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest — labeled 'Interest income' on IS. Used for unlevered FCF and interest coverage context.
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities_current: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent from BS xbrl_not_on_statement — component of Accrued and other current liabilities.
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities_noncurrent: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent — labeled 'Long-term operating lease liabilities' on BS face.
company_mapping.cash_paid_for_interest: Not separately disclosed in supplemental CF disclosures. Only cash paid for income taxes is disclosed (us-gaap:IncomeTaxesPaidNet). Will approximate with IS interest expense for metric 21.
company_mapping.cash_paid_for_taxes: us-gaap:IncomeTaxesPaidNet — labeled 'Cash paid for income taxes, net' in CF supplemental disclosures.
company_mapping.inventory_raw_materials: us-gaap:InventoryRawMaterialsNetOfReserves — from BS xbrl_not_on_statement, inventory detail note.
company_mapping.inventory_wip: us-gaap:InventoryWorkInProcessNetOfReserves — from BS xbrl_not_on_statement, inventory detail note.
company_mapping.inventory_finished_goods: us-gaap:InventoryFinishedGoodsNetOfReserves — from BS xbrl_not_on_statement, inventory detail note.
company_mapping.sbc_allocated_by_function: us-gaap:AllocatedShareBasedCompensationExpense from IS xbrl_not_on_statement — total SBC per note, matches CF addback exactly.
company_mapping.segment_revenue_compute_networking: Segment revenue for Compute and Networking from segment_data dimension StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis.
company_mapping.segment_revenue_graphics: Segment revenue for Graphics from segment_data dimension StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis.
company_mapping.segment_operating_income_compute_network: Segment operating income for Compute and Networking from segment_data.
company_mapping.segment_operating_income_graphics: Segment operating income for Graphics from segment_data.
company_mapping.effective_tax_rate: us-gaap:EffectiveIncomeTaxRateContinuingOperations from IS xbrl_not_on_statement — disclosed in income tax note.
company_mapping.dilutive_awards: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberDilutedSharesOutstandingAdjustment from IS xbrl_not_on_statement — dilutive impact of equity awards.
company_mapping.purchases_of_non_marketable_equity: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireEquitySecuritiesFvNi — labeled 'Purchases of non-marketable equity securities' in CF investing section.
company_mapping.operating_lease_payments_cash: us-gaap:OperatingLeasePayments from CF xbrl_not_on_statement — supplemental lease cash flow disclosure.
company_mapping.capital_expenditures_not_yet_paid: us-gaap:CapitalExpendituresIncurredButNotYetPaid from CF xbrl_not_on_statement — non-cash investing activity.

segment_reconciliation_to_consolidated.note: Segment total operating income 30,605M vs consolidated operating income 28,440M. Difference due to unallocated SBC (-1,624M), unallocated cost of revenue and opex (-440M), acquisition-related and other costs (-101M). Segment reconciliation goes to pretax income including interest income, interest expense, and other income.
